# space-ark Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-03-31

## Active Technologies
- AsyncStorage para preferencias e hidratacao de estado; SQLite local para evolucao de decks, cards e historico; Firebase como persistencia remota futura via adapters (001-setup-expo-app)

- TypeScript 5.x em projeto Expo React Native + Expo, Expo Router, Zustand, Zod, AsyncStorage, Expo SQLite, React Native SVG (001-setup-expo-app)

## Project Structure

```text
src/
tests/
```

## Commands

npm test && npm run lint

## Code Style

TypeScript 5.x em projeto Expo React Native: Follow standard conventions
